<?php /** * Module adds the nofollow attribute transformation to a tags. It * is enabled by HTML.Nofollow */ class HTMLPurifier_HTMLModule_Nofollow extends HTMLPurifier_HTMLModule { /** * @type string */ public $name = 'Nofollow'; /** * @param HTMLPurifier_Config $config */ public function setup($config) { $a = $this->addBlankElement('a'); $a->attr_transform_post[] = new HTMLPurifier_AttrTransform_Nofollow(); } } // vim: et sw=4 sts=4
